_publications._publicationTitle: ALTERED CALCIUM CURRENTS AND AXONAL GROWTH IN Nf1 HAPLOINSUFFICIENT MICE.

_contextSnippet: potassium (50 mM KCl)-stimulated glutamate release was ~45% higher in neurons from Nf1+/− cells compared with wild-type cells; 63.0 ± 3.3% total glutamate content/15 min versus 43.1 ± 1.8% total glutamate content/15
details: Potassium-stimulated glutamate release was ~45% higher in neurons from Nf1+/- cells: 63.0 ± 3.3% versus 43.1 ± 1.8% total glutamate content/15 min (p<0.05)
